title: calophyllum tetrapterum var. obovale
intro: Calophyllum tetrapterum var. obovale is a variety of the Calophyllum tetrapterum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to Australia and known for its unique, four-angled fruit. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum tetrapterum var. obovale include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
